seo.description: Care assistant jobs across Greater London with Vigil Care Staffing — hands-on residential care roles, flexible shifts and a directly-vetted, DBS-checked agency.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Care Assistant Jobs in London
fields.sub: Care assistant jobs across Greater London with Vigil Care Staffing — hands-on residential care roles, flexible shifts and a directly-vetted, DBS-checked agency.
fields.cta_label: Apply to Join Vigil Care Staffing
fields.image_alt: A care worker supporting a resident in a London care setting

fields.heading: Care assistant roles in London care homes
fields.body: Care assistant assignments with Vigil Care Staffing put you at the heart of residential care across Greater London. You support residents with personal care, daily living and companionship in care and nursing homes, working alongside permanent teams. We offer short-notice cover for rota gaps as well as longer placements, so you can find work that suits your availability. As a directly-vetting, DBS-checked agency we employ our people properly, check right-to-work documents on file and respond to every query within 15 minutes. Apply once, tell us the areas of London you can reach and the shifts you prefer, and we will match you to suitable care assistant work.

items.title: Residential care
items.body: Support residents with personal care, meals and companionship in care and nursing homes.

items.title: Short-notice cover
items.body: Pick up same-day and short-notice shifts to fill rota gaps across London.

items.title: Ongoing placements
items.body: Build a steady pattern of work with longer assignments where a provider needs regular support.

items.a: Some assignments suit experienced care assistants; others welcome people building a care career. We match you to suitable work after screening.
Yes. Tell us your availability and preferred areas of London, and we offer assignments that fit around it where we can.

fields.heading: Ready to start your next care assignment?
fields.sub: Apply once and our team will talk through the assignments that fit you.
